description:
Antagonistic quality review of `hx-combobox` (T1-04) **after implementation completes**.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-combobox/` with a critical eye.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict compliance, no `any`, all filtering/selection types exported, options typed
2. Accessibility — combobox ARIA pattern (role=combobox, aria-expanded, aria-controls, aria-activedescendant), keyboard: Arrow Down/Up navigate options, Enter selects, Escape closes, Home/End, axe-core pass
3. Tests — filtering, selection, keyboard nav, async options, multi-select if applicable, empty state, 80%+ coverage
4. Storybook — all variants with controls including search/filter demos
5. CSS — `--hx-*` tokens, dropdown positioning, focus ring on both input and options, CSS parts
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB
7. Drupal — Twig-renderable, progressive enhancement

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-combobox/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2) and file:line references. DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-combobox — T1-04 antagonistic quality review
